description: Main entry point React component for IAF 2D/3D Viewer with database management

props.modelVersionId: Specific model version ID to load (defaults to latest)
props.sliceElementIds: Slice element IDs (enables glass mode if provided)
props.viewerResizeCanvas: Flag to resize canvas when container size changes
props.showNotification: Flag to show notifications (defaults to PropertyStore.showNotification)
props.onHoverIconColor: Icon color on hover (defaults to PropertyStore.onHoverIconColor)
props.onActiveIconColor: Icon color when active (defaults to PropertyStore.onActiveIconColor)
props.title: Viewer title (defaults to PropertyStore.title)
props.enableFocusMode: Enable focus mode flag (defaults to PropertyStore.enableFocusMode)
props.enableOptimizedSelection: Enable optimized selection flag (defaults to PropertyStore.enableOptimizedSelection)
props.isShowNavCube: Show navigation cube flag (defaults to PropertyStore.isShowNavCube)

callbacks.OnSelectedElementChangeCallback: Callback when element selection changes (parameter: selectedElementIDs)
callbacks.OnIsolateElementChangeCallback: Callback when element isolation changes (parameter: isolateElementIDs)
callbacks.OnHiddenElementChangeCallback: Callback when hidden elements change (parameter: hiddenElementIDs)
callbacks.On2dToolbarConfigCallback: Callback for 2D toolbar configuration (parameters: toolbarList, measurementList, viewList, navigationList, shadingList, manipulateList)
callbacks.On3dToolbarConfigCallback: Callback for 3D toolbar configuration (parameters: toolbarList, measurementList, viewList, navigationList, shadingList, manipulateList)
callbacks.OnDefaultToolbarConfigCallback: Callback for default toolbar configuration (parameters: toolbarList, measurementList, viewList, navigationList, shadingList, manipulateList)
callbacks.OnNotificationCallback: Callback when notification is shown (parameter: message)
callbacks.OnViewerReadyCallback: Callback when viewer is ready (parameter: message)

state.scriptLoadedCommunicator: Flag indicating if Communicator script is loaded
state.isModelLoaded: Flag indicating if model is loaded
state.permissionsInitialized: Flag indicating if permissions are initialized

methods.constructor: Initialize IafViewerDBM with props and state
methods.componentDidMount: Lifecycle method - initialize permissions and load model
methods.componentDidUpdate: Lifecycle method - handle prop and state changes
methods.initializeViewerPermissions: Initialize viewer permissions for current user and project
methods.loadModelInfo: Load model information and graphics resources
methods.getUnits: Get units from model properties (parameter: propCollId)
methods.openNotification: Open notification with message, duration, and severity

usage.description: Main entry point for integrating IAF Viewer into applications
